---
title: "Class05"
author: "Sathvik S Guntha"
format: pdf
---

#Lab 4 
#For the installation of GGplot we need to do:
install.packages("ggplot2")


Anytime I need to use this package I need
```{R}
library(ggplot2)
```


View(cars)

A quick base R plot- this is not ggplot.
```{R}
plot(cars)
```


#First ggplot (data + aesthetic + geom)

```{R}
ggplot(data = cars) + aes(x = speed ,y = dist) + geom_point()
```


```{R}
p <- ggplot(data = cars) + aes(x = speed ,y = dist) + geom_point()

#Add a line geom with geom_line()
p + geom_line() 

p + geom_smooth(method = "lm")
```



```{R}
url <- "https://bioboot.github.io/bimm143_S20/class-material/up_down_expression.txt"
genes <- read.delim(url)
head(genes)
```

Analysis of the dataset:
```{R}
g <- ggplot(data = genes) + aes(x= Condition1, y = Condition2, col = State) + geom_point()

#Number of genes
nrow(genes)

#Names of columns
colnames(genes)

#Number of columans
ncol(genes)

#Summary of the State column in genes:
table(genes$State) 

#upregulated genes are 127

#We look at the up section for the value for it.

#Fraction of up genes:
round((table(genes$State) / nrow(genes)) * 100, 2) 
```

Color to ggplot
```{R}
g + scale_color_manual(values = c("blue", "grey", "red"))

g+ labs(title = "Gene Expression Changes", x = "Control (No Drug)") + theme_bw()

```
